generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input electrical current of the robot joint actuator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentRawTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring angular velocity of a robot joint"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityTransmitted
]

instance AxisPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring first‑axis position of the robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AxisPositionTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – Data transmitted
instance InputCurrentRawTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
]

instance AxisPositionTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AxisPositionSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance RawCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw input current measurement received from the robot joint"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentRawTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PreprocessingComponent
]

instance FilteredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Low‑pass filtered current signal used for friction estimation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentRawTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PreprocessingComponent
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity measurement of the joint"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PreprocessingComponent
]

instance AxisPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "First‑axis position measurement of the robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AxisPositionTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PreprocessingComponent
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PreprocessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component that filters raw current, synchronises sensor streams and prepares JSON payloads"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionMonitoringService,
                        PredictiveFaultDetectionService,
                        AutomaticModelUpdateService
]

instance MQTTBrokerComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker that converts data points into JSON and publishes on hierarchical topics defined in the AAS"
    DTDFVocab:enables CentralDataMemoryService
]

instance AASExecutorComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AAS Executor that subscribes to MQTT topics, assembles the digital shadow and stores it in the database"
    DTDFVocab:enables ClosedLoopFrictionCompensationService
]

instance OptimisationEngineComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine that simulates machining parameters to minimise CO₂ emissions and improve product quality"
    DTDFVocab:enables MachiningParameterOptimisationService
]

instance ModelUpdateComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component that updates white‑box model parameters and retrains the neural‑network friction model"
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomaticModelUpdateService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time monitoring of joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionInsight
]

instance PredictiveFaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Delivers predictive analytics for early fault detection of the joint"
    DTDFVocab:provides EarlyFaultDetectionInsight
]

instance AutomaticModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatically updates friction model parameters and retrains neural‑network models"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

instance ClosedLoopFrictionCompensationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes closed‑loop control that compensates internal joint friction during runtime"
    DTDFVocab:provides CompensateJointFrictionAction
]

instance MachiningParameterOptimisationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimises machining parameters to reduce CO₂ emissions and enhance product quality"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimiseMachiningParametersAction
]

instance CentralDataMemoryService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Acts as a central data memory for downstream applications"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataMemoryInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance RealTimeFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the instantaneous friction level of each joint"
]

instance EarlyFaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing early warning of impending joint faults based on friction trends"
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to automatically update white‑box friction model parameters and retrain the neural‑network"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CompensateJointFrictionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that sends compensation commands to the robot control system to counteract measured friction"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimiseMachiningParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that computes optimal machining settings to lower CO₂ emissions while maintaining quality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMemoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that the digital twin provides stored data to downstream applications via the ThingsBoard platform"
]

// C10: Models
instance WhiteBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based white‑box friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PreprocessingComponent, ModelUpdateComponent
]

instance BlackBoxNeuralNetworkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑driven black‑box neural network predictor that learns friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PreprocessingComponent, ModelUpdateComponent
]

instance DataCalculationTransformModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical transformation model that converts raw sensor traces into feature vectors for the friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PreprocessingComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on a continuous real‑time synchronization loop: live sensor data from the robot is streamed to the shadow, processed by simulation models and fed back to the control system within the control cycle. The approach explicitly addresses the “real‑time requirements of the calculations and the associated dead time of the control system”, implying sub‑cycle latency (i.e., latency smaller than the controller’s sampling period) and a granular time resolution sufficient for high‑precision friction compensation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows a pipeline architecture orchestrated by an Asset Administration Shell (AAS). Live robot data are collected via MQTT and stored in ThingsBoard; a processing component consumes the data, runs executable Simulink friction models (integrated through the Functional Mock‑up Interface, FMI), and the resulting digital shadow is written back to the AAS and visualized on a dashboard. Resource management and coordination are handled automatically by the AAS‑driven pipeline, linking SysML structural models, simulation models, and data storage in a single orchestrated flow."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained by calibrating physics‑based white‑box models (e.g., Simulink) against measured data and continuously monitoring the prediction error of black‑box models. Validation and verification are achieved through fine‑grained traceability: each output data trace is linked to its generating processing component and source models via the originates‑from relationship, allowing verification of transformations from SysML/ADL specifications to simulation or calculation models. Uncertainty arising from sensor noise, model approximations, or data‑transmission delays is quantified by comparing measured and simulated values stored in the digital shadow; significant deviations trigger automatic parameter re‑identification or model retraining. Quality assurance includes monitoring real‑time constraints such as control‑loop dead time, ensuring that model updates and data processing meet the timing requirements of the robot’s control system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical network relies on the MQTT publish‑subscribe protocol (Mosquitto implementation) for transport of JSON‑encoded sensor readings. A lightweight MQTT broker mediates communication between the robot’s preprocessing unit and the AAS Executor. Topics are hierarchically organised, enabling fine‑grained access control (read/write permissions) as defined in the AAS. The digital‑shadow pipeline also incorporates the ThingsBoard IoT platform, which consumes the MQTT messages for storage and real‑time dashboard visualization. Simulation models are packaged as FMU files (Functional Mock‑up Units) exported from Simulink and referenced in the AAS; the AAS Executor loads and executes these FMUs as part of the shadow computation. No explicit bandwidth, latency, redundancy or security protocol details are provided in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration relies on Industry 4.0 standards: data are exchanged over MQTT to the ThingsBoard IoT platform, the digital shadow is exposed through an Asset Administration Shell (AAS), and simulation models are coupled via the FMI standard. This enables interoperability with external enterprise systems, other digital twins, and IoT devices, following a purpose‑driven paradigm and reference‑model conformance."
]
